/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_XML_DESCRIPTION: CWM LivingWord Bible Reading Plan Component for Joomla 5/6
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_MENU_HOME_DESC: The main entry point for LivingWord. Displays today's Bible reading with mark-as-read, progress tracking, and audio options. Use this as the primary menu item for the component.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_MENU_PLANVIEW_DESC: Displays all readings in the user's selected plan as a list.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_MENU_PLANVIEW_CALENDAR_DE: Displays the reading plan in a calendar grid layout.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_MENU_RESOURCES_DESC: Displays curated Bible study resource links by category.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_MENU_SETTINGS_DESC: Allows logged-in users to select their plan, version, and email preferences.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_MENU_TOOLS_DESC: Displays Bible dictionary and commentary tool links.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_MENU_GROUPS_DESC: Displays reading groups the user belongs to and available groups to join.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_MENU_GROUP_DETAIL_DESC: Displays a single reading group with member progress.

/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_XML_DESCRIPTION: CWM LivingWord Bible Reading Plan Component
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_TOOL_NAME_DESC: Display name for this study tool.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_TOOL_DESCRIPTION_DESC: Brief description shown below the tool name.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_TOOL_URL_DESC: Web address for this study tool.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_TOOL_ICON_DESC: Icon displayed next to the tool name.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_ERROR_TOOL_NAME_REQUIRED: Please enter a name for this tool.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_ERROR_TOOL_URL_REQUIRED: Please enter a URL for this tool.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_PLAN_ALIAS_DESC: URL-safe identifier slug (e.g. comp, newtest, bio)
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_PLAN_TITLE_DESC: Display name or language key for the plan
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_PLAN_DESCRIPTION_DESC: Short plain-text subtitle shown on the home page and plan headings. e.g. 'Read through the Bible in one year.'
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_PLAN_MESSAGE_DESC: Optional rich-text introduction shown on the home page below the description. Supports HTML formatting for welcome text, instructions, or encouragement.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_PLAN_AUDIO_DESC: Show audio player for readings in this plan.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_PLAN_AUDIO_VERSION_DESC: Bible translation for audio playback. Leave as default to use the subscriber's chosen version.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_PLAN_TESTAMENT_DESC: Which testament(s) does this plan cover?
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_PLAN_DURATION_TYPE_DESC: How the plan progresses over time.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_PLAN_TOTAL_DAYS_DESC: Number of days in this plan. Leave empty to auto-calculate from readings.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_SAVE_PLAN_FIRST: Save the plan first, then add readings.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_BULK_IMPORT_DESC: Paste readings below, one per line. Each line becomes one day in order.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_READING_PLAN_DESC: Plan name this reading belongs to
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_READING_AUDIO_OVERRIDE_DE: Optional: custom audio URL for this reading. Overrides BibleBrain audio.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_READING_DEVOTIONAL_DESC: Optional devotional or reflection note shown below the reading. Supports basic HTML.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_LINK_CATEGORY_DESC: Category to group this link under
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_DATABASE_MAINTENANCE_DESC: Optimize, check, or repair the LivingWord database tables.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_BACKUP_DESC: Download a SQL backup of all LivingWord data.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_CSV_IMPORT_DESC: Import reading plan details from a CSV file.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_CSV_FORMAT: Format: day_number, reading, audio_url, description (one row per day)
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_CSV_READ_ERROR: Could not read the uploaded file.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_STATS_INACTIVE_DESC: Users who haven't completed a reading in over 7 days.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_ERROR_PHP_VERSION: LivingWord requires PHP %s or later. You are running PHP %s.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_ERROR_JOOMLA_VERSION: LivingWord requires Joomla %s or later. You are running Joomla %s.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_ERROR_SCRIPTURE_LIBRARY: The CWM Scripture Library (lib_cwmscripture) is not installed. Scripture text display will be limited to passage references only.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_CONFIG_STARTDATE_DESC: Default start date for reading plans.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_CONFIG_VERSION_DESC: Bible translation code used when user has no preference (e.g. kjv, web, nlt).
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_CONFIG_PLAN_DESC: Reading plan assigned to new users.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_CONFIG_PLAN_TEMPLATE_DESC: Template for displaying the full reading plan.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_CONFIG_EMAIL_LOGO_DESC: Full URL to your church or organization logo image. Displayed in the email header. Recommended max height: 48px.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_CONFIG_EMAIL_ORG_NAME_DES: Displayed in the email header and footer. Defaults to the Joomla site name if empty.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_CONFIG_EMAIL_COLOR_DESC: Primary color used for the email header bar and CTA buttons.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_CONFIG_EMAIL_FOOTER_DESC: Optional message shown in every email footer. Use for church address, website, or a short greeting.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_CONFIG_SCRIPTURE_DISPLAY_: How scripture text appears when lib_cwmscripture is available.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_CONFIG_SHOW_AUDIO_DESC: Show the audio Bible player on the reading view when BibleBrain is configured.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_CONFIG_AUDIO_VERSION_DESC: Default BibleBrain audio fileset code used when plan and user don't specify one.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_SCRIPTURE_LIBRARY_OK_DESC: Inline Bible text, provider-based lookups, and audio are available.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_SCRIPTURE_LIBRARY_MISSING: Install lib_cwmscripture to enable inline Bible text and audio playback. Readings will link to BibleGateway instead.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_AUDIO_NO_LIBRARY: CWM Scripture Library not installed. Audio requires lib_cwmscripture.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_AUDIO_NO_KEY: BibleBrain not configured. Set API key in Scripture Library settings.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_PLAN_TEST_AUDIO_NO_VERSIO: Enter an audio version code first.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_PLAN_TEST_AUDIO_NO_READIN: Save at least one reading first.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_GROUP_NAME_DESC: Display name for this reading group.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_GROUP_DESCRIPTION_DESC: Describe this group's purpose or audience.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_GROUP_PLAN_DESC: Which plan does this group follow?
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_GROUP_START_DATE_DESC: When this group's reading plan begins.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_GROUP_INVITE_TOKEN_DESC: Unique token for the group invite link. Auto-generated on first save.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_GROUP_JOIN_MODE_DESC: How new members can join this group.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_GROUP_SAVE_FIRST: Save the group first, then manage members.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_GROUP_INVITE_EMAIL_DESC: Enter one or more email addresses separated by commas.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_INVITES_FAILED: Failed to send invitations. Please try again.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_INVITES_INVALID: Invalid group or no emails provided.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_INVITE_EMAIL_BODY:
You've been invited to join the reading group %1$s on %2$s.

Click the button below to join and start reading together.

/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_SAVE_GROUP_FIRST: Save the group first, then manage members.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_ACL_HOME_DESC: Allow users to view the LivingWord home page.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_ACL_SETTINGS_DESC: Allow users to view their preferences.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_ACL_TOOLS_DESC: Allow users to view study tools.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_ACL_LINKS_DESC: Allow users to view Bible resource links.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.COM_LIVINGWORD_ACL_GROUPS_ADMIN_DESC: Allow Pastor/Elder role to manage all reading groups.

/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.MOD_LIVINGWORD_XML_DESCRIPTION: Displays the daily Bible reading from the LivingWord component.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.MOD_LIVINGWORD_SHOW_LINK_DESC: Show a link to the full reading.

/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.PLG_TASK_LIVINGWORD_XML_DESCRIPTION: Sends daily Bible reading email notifications and weekly partner digests to subscribed LivingWord users.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.PLG_TASK_LIVINGWORD_EMAIL_DESC: Sends email notifications with today's Bible reading to all subscribed users.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.PLG_TASK_LIVINGWORD_WEEKLY_DIGEST_DESC: Sends a weekly summary email with readings completed, streak, pace, and encouragement to all subscribed users.
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.PLG_TASK_LIVINGWORD_PARTNER_DIGEST_TITLE: LivingWord: Send Weekly Partner Progress Digest
/Volumes/BCCExt_APFS_Extreme_Pro/GitHub/.PLG_TASK_LIVINGWORD_PARTNER_DIGEST_DESC: Sends a weekly email summary of accountability partner reading progress to paired users.
